    <script>
(function () {
    var ph = window.__IMG_FALLBACK_SRC__;
    if (!ph) {
        return;
    }
    function armImg(img) {
        if (!img || img.nodeName !== 'IMG' || img.dataset.imgFallbackArmed) {
            return;
        }
        img.dataset.imgFallbackArmed = '1';
        function swap() {
            var s = img.getAttribute('src') || '';
            if (s.indexOf('no_image.svg') !== -1) {
                return;
            }
            img.src = ph;
        }
        img.addEventListener('error', swap, { once: true });
        if (img.complete && img.naturalWidth === 0) {
            var hs = img.getAttribute('src');
            if (hs && hs.length > 0 && hs.indexOf('no_image.svg') === -1) {
                swap();
            }
        }
    }
    function scan(root) {
        if (!root || root.nodeType !== 1) {
            return;
        }
        if (root.matches && root.matches('img')) {
            armImg(root);
        }
        if (root.querySelectorAll) {
            root.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(armImg);
        }
    }
    function startObserver() {
        if (!document.body) {
            return;
        }
        var t;
        var mo = new MutationObserver(function (mutations) {
            clearTimeout(t);
            t = setTimeout(function () {
                mutations.forEach(function (m) {
                    m.addedNodes.forEach(function (n) {
                        scan(n);
                    });
                });
            }, 0);
        });
        mo.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    }
    function init() {
        scan(document.documentElement);
        startObserver();
    }
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
    } else {
        init();
    }
})();
</script>

(function () {
    function notifPanelFromBell(btn) {
        if (!btn) return null;
        const headerRight = btn.closest('.header-right');
        return headerRight ? headerRight.querySelector('.dropdown-menu.notification') : null;
    }

    function getOrCreateNotifPanelObserver(panel) {
        if (!panel || panel._notifLazyIo) {
            return panel ? panel._notifLazyIo : null;
        }
        if (!('IntersectionObserver' in window)) {
            return null;
        }
        panel._notifLazyIo = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
            entries.forEach(function (entry) {
                if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
                var img = entry.target;
                var ds = img.getAttribute('data-src');
                if (!ds) return;
                img.src = ds;
                img.removeAttribute('data-src');
                img.setAttribute('data-notif-loaded', '1');
                panel._notifLazyIo.unobserve(img);
                img.removeAttribute('data-notif-wired');
            });
        }, { root: panel, rootMargin: '100px 0px', threshold: 0.01 });
        return panel._notifLazyIo;
    }

    function wireNotificationLazyImages(panel) {
        if (!panel) return;
        var io = getOrCreateNotifPanelObserver(panel);
        if (!io) {
            panel.querySelectorAll('img.notif-lazy-img[data-src]').forEach(function (img) {
                img.src = img.getAttribute('data-src');
                img.removeAttribute('data-src');
                img.setAttribute('data-notif-loaded', '1');
            });
            return;
        }
        panel.querySelectorAll('img.notif-lazy-img[data-src]').forEach(function (img) {
            if (img.getAttribute('data-notif-wired')) return;
            img.setAttribute('data-notif-wired', '1');
            io.observe(img);
        });
    }

    window.scheduleNotifLazyForPanel = function (panel) {
        if (!panel) return;
        requestAnimationFrame(function () {
            requestAnimationFrame(function () {
                wireNotificationLazyImages(panel);
            });
        });
    };

    window.prefetchNotifImagesNearBell = function (btn, limit) {
        var panel = notifPanelFromBell(btn);
        if (!panel) return;
        var n = 0;
        var max = typeof limit === 'number' ? limit : 4;
        panel.querySelectorAll('img.notif-lazy-img[data-src]').forEach(function (img) {
            if (n >= max) return;
            if (img.getAttribute('data-notif-loaded')) return;
            var ds = img.getAttribute('data-src');
            if (!ds) return;
            if (panel._notifLazyIo) {
                try {
                    panel._notifLazyIo.unobserve(img);
                } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
            }
            img.src = ds;
            img.removeAttribute('data-src');
            img.removeAttribute('data-notif-wired');
            img.setAttribute('data-notif-loaded', '1');
            n++;
        });
    };

    window.wireAllOpenNotifPanels = function () {
        document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.notification').forEach(function (panel) {
            if (panel.style.display === 'block') {
                window.scheduleNotifLazyForPanel(panel);
            }
        });
    };
})();

(function () {
    const NOTIF_SOUND_URL = "https:\/\/yourmart.pk\/sounds\/notification-new.mp3";
    let notifAudioUnlocked = false;
    let notifSoundAudio = null;

    function getNotifSoundAudio() {
        if (!notifSoundAudio && NOTIF_SOUND_URL) {
            notifSoundAudio = new Audio(NOTIF_SOUND_URL);
            notifSoundAudio.preload = 'auto';
        }
        return notifSoundAudio;
    }

    function playNewNotificationSound() {
        if (!notifAudioUnlocked) return;
        const a = getNotifSoundAudio();
        if (!a) return;
        try {
            a.volume = 1;
            a.currentTime = 0;
            var p = a.play();
            if (p && typeof p.catch === 'function') {
                p.catch(function () { /* autoplay / decode */ });
            }
        } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
    }

    function unlockNotifAudioOnce() {
        if (notifAudioUnlocked) return;
        notifAudioUnlocked = true;
        const Ctx = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
        if (Ctx) {
            try {
                const ctx = new Ctx();
                if (ctx.state === 'suspended') {
                    ctx.resume();
                }
                ctx.close();
            } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
        }
        try {
            var a = getNotifSoundAudio();
            if (a) {
                a.volume = 0.02;
                var pr = a.play();
                if (pr && pr.then) {
                    pr.then(function () {
                        a.pause();
                        a.currentTime = 0;
                        a.volume = 1;
                    }).catch(function () {
                        a.volume = 1;
                    });
                } else {
                    a.volume = 1;
                }
            }
        } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
    }

    function notifEsc(s) {
        const d = document.createElement('div');
        d.textContent = s == null ? '' : String(s);
        return d.innerHTML;
    }

    function notifIconClass(color) {
        if (color === 'Message Message--orange') return 'fa fa-exclamation';
        if (color === 'Message Message--green') return 'fa fa-check';
        if (color === 'Message Message--red') return 'fa fa-times';
        return 'fa fa-bell-o';
    }

    function buildNotificationMessageHtml(n) {
        const icon = notifEsc(notifIconClass(n.color));
        const title = notifEsc(n.title);
        const message = notifEsc(n.message);
        const color = notifEsc(n.color);
        const id = notifEsc(String(n.id));
        let linkHtml = '';
        if (n.link) {
            linkHtml = '<p class="text-right text-dark"><a href="' + notifEsc(n.link) + '" class="text-dark" target="_blank" rel="noopener">CLICK TO SEE</a></p>';
        }
        let imgHtml = '';
        if (n.image_url) {
            imgHtml = '<img class="notif-lazy-img" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///ywAAAAAAQABAAACAUwAOw==" data-src="' +
                notifEsc(n.image_url) + '" alt="" width="50" height="50" decoding="async" style="width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 4px; object-fit: cover;">';
        }
        return '<div class="Message ' + color + '" data-id="' + id + '">' +
            '<div class="Message-icon"><h4 class="text-white">' + title + '</h4><i class="' + icon + '"></i></div>' +
            '<div class="Message-body border-dynamic ' + color + '"><p>' + message + '</p>' + linkHtml + imgHtml + '</div>' +
            '<button type="button" class="Message-close js-messageClose"><i class="fa fa-times"></i></button></div>';
    }

    function insertNotificationIntoPanel(panel, node) {
        if (!node) return;
        const el = node.cloneNode(true);
        el.querySelectorAll('img.notif-lazy-img').forEach(function (img) {
            img.removeAttribute('data-notif-wired');
        });
        const emptyP = panel.querySelector('p.text-center.p-3.text-muted');
        if (emptyP) emptyP.remove();
        const firstMsg = panel.querySelector('.Message');
        if (firstMsg) {
            panel.insertBefore(el, firstMsg);
        } else {
            const markBtn = panel.querySelector('.mark-all-read');
            if (markBtn) {
                markBtn.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', el);
            } else {
                const h5 = panel.querySelector('h5');
                if (h5) h5.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', el);
                else panel.appendChild(el);
            }
        }
    }

    function syncMarkAllReadVisibility(unseenCount) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.notification').forEach(function (panel) {
            const btn = panel.querySelector('.mark-all-read');
            if (!btn) return;
            btn.style.display = unseenCount > 1 ? '' : 'none';
        });
    }

    window.runNotificationPoll = function () {
        if (!NOTIF_POLL_ENABLED) return;
        const token = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]');
        fetch('/api/notifications/poll?after_id=' + encodeURIComponent(String(notifPollAfterId)), {
            method: 'GET',
            headers: {
                'Accept': 'application/json',
                'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
                'X-CSRF-TOKEN': token ? token.getAttribute('content') : ''
            },
            credentials: 'same-origin'
        })
            .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
            .then(function (data) {
                if (!data || !data.success) return;
                updateAllBadges(data.unseen_count);
                syncMarkAllReadVisibility(data.unseen_count);
                const list = data.new_notifications || [];
                let maxSeen = notifPollAfterId;
                list.forEach(function (n) {
                    const sid = String(n.id);
                    if (document.querySelector('.dropdown-menu.notification .Message[data-id="' + sid + '"]')) {
                        maxSeen = Math.max(maxSeen, n.id);
                        return;
                    }
                    playNewNotificationSound();
                    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
                    wrap.innerHTML = buildNotificationMessageHtml(n).trim();
                    const templateNode = wrap.firstElementChild;
                    document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.notification').forEach(function (panel) {
                        insertNotificationIntoPanel(panel, templateNode);
                    });
                    maxSeen = Math.max(maxSeen, n.id);
                });
                if (typeof window.wireAllOpenNotifPanels === 'function') {
                    window.wireAllOpenNotifPanels();
                }
                notifPollAfterId = Math.max(notifPollAfterId, data.max_id || 0, maxSeen);
            })
            .catch(function () { /* ignore */ });
    };

    document.addEventListener('click', unlockNotifAudioOnce, { once: false, capture: true });
    document.addEventListener('keydown', unlockNotifAudioOnce, { once: false, capture: true });

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
        if (!NOTIF_POLL_ENABLED) return;
        window.runNotificationPoll();
        window.setInterval(window.runNotificationPoll, 25000);
    });
})();


function handleNotifToggle(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();

    var btn = e.currentTarget && e.currentTarget.closest ? e.currentTarget.closest('.notificationBtn') : null;
    var headerRight = btn && btn.closest ? btn.closest('.header-right') : null;
    var panel = headerRight ? headerRight.querySelector('.dropdown-menu.notification') : document.querySelector('.dropdown-menu.notification');
    if (!panel) return;

    document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu').forEach(function (d) {
        if (d !== panel) d.style.display = 'none';
    });

    if (panel.style.display === 'block') {
        panel.style.display = 'none';
    } else {
        panel.style.display = 'block';
        panel.style.opacity = '1';
        panel.style.visibility = 'visible';
        if (typeof window.scheduleNotifLazyForPanel === 'function') {
            window.scheduleNotifLazyForPanel(panel);
        }
    }
}

// Main click handler for notification actions
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    
    // MARK ALL AS READ

     const btn = e.target.closest('.mark-all-read');
    if (btn) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        
        const btn = e.target.closest('.mark-all-read');
        const originalText = btn.innerHTML;
        
        btn.disabled = true;
        btn.innerHTML = 'Marking...';
        
        fetch('/api/dropshippers/notifications/mark-all-read', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Accept': 'application/json',
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
                'X-CSRF-TOKEN': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.getAttribute('content') || ''
            },
            credentials: 'same-origin'
        })
        .then(res => res.json())
        .then(response => {
            btn.disabled = false;
            btn.innerHTML = originalText;
            
            if (response.success) {
                // Hide all notification messages
                document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.notification .Message').forEach(msg => {
                    msg.style.display = 'none';
                });
                
                // Update badge
                updateAllBadges(response.unseen_count);
                
                // Show empty state if needed
                const notifPanel = document.querySelector('.dropdown-menu.notification');
                if (notifPanel && notifPanel.querySelectorAll('.Message:not([style*="display: none"])').length === 0) {
                    notifPanel.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', '<p class="text-center p-3 text-muted">No notifications</p>');
                }
                
                btn.style.display = 'none';
            } else {
                alert('Failed to mark all as read.');
            }
        })
        .catch(err => {
            btn.disabled = false;
            btn.innerHTML = originalText;
            console.error('Mark all read error:', err);
            alert('Error marking notifications as read');
        });
        return;
    }
    
    // DELETE SINGLE NOTIFICATION (Mark as read in DB, hide in UI)
    if (e.target.closest('.js-messageClose')) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        
        const closeBtn = e.target.closest('.js-messageClose');
        const msg = closeBtn.closest('.Message');
        const id = msg.getAttribute('data-id');
        
        if (!id) {
            console.error('Notification ID not found');
            return;
        }

        const idStr = String(id);
        if (!/^\d+$/.test(idStr)) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.notification .Message').forEach(function (m) {
                if (m.getAttribute('data-id') === idStr) {
                    m.remove();
                }
            });
            const badge = document.querySelector('.notification-badge-class');
            const prev = parseInt(badge && badge.textContent, 10) || 0;
            updateAllBadges(Math.max(0, prev - 1));
            document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.notification').forEach(function (notifPanel) {
                if (notifPanel.querySelectorAll('.Message').length === 0) {
                    notifPanel.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', '<p class="text-center p-3 text-muted">No notifications</p>');
                    const markAllBtn = notifPanel.querySelector('.mark-all-read');
                    if (markAllBtn) markAllBtn.style.display = 'none';
                }
            });
            return;
        }
        
        // Visual feedback
        msg.style.opacity = '0.5';
        closeBtn.disabled = true;
        
        // Mark as read in database (not delete)
        fetch('/api/dropshippers/notifications/' + encodeURIComponent(idStr), {
            method: 'DELETE',
            headers: {
                'Accept': 'application/json',
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
                'X-CSRF-TOKEN': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.getAttribute('content') || ''
            },
            credentials: 'same-origin'
        })
        .then(res => res.json())
        .then(response => {
            if (response.success) {
                document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.notification .Message').forEach(function (m) {
                    if (m.getAttribute('data-id') === idStr) {
                        m.remove();
                    }
                });
                updateAllBadges(response.unseen_count);
                document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.notification').forEach(function (notifPanel) {
                    if (notifPanel.querySelectorAll('.Message').length === 0) {
                        notifPanel.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', '<p class="text-center p-3 text-muted">No notifications</p>');
                        const markAllBtn = notifPanel.querySelector('.mark-all-read');
                        if (markAllBtn) markAllBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                });
            } else {
                msg.style.opacity = '1';
                closeBtn.disabled = false;
                alert('Failed to mark notification as read.');
            }
        })
        .catch(err => {
            msg.style.opacity = '1';
            closeBtn.disabled = false;
            console.error('Delete error:', err);
            alert('Could not process notification. Check console for details.');
        });
        return;
    }
});

 <script>
    window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
        // Attach listener to the window object
        window.addEventListener('cart-updated', function (event) {
            const cart = event.detail;
            $(".cart_counter").html(cart.length);
            updateCartUI(cart);
        });
        const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cart'))|| [];

        $(".cart_counter").html(cart.length);
        updateCartUI(cart);
    });

    function updateCartUI(cart) {
        const admin = "https://admin.yourmart.pk/" + 'storage/uploads/inventory/products/media/';

        const cartContainer = document.querySelector('.dropdown-cart-products');
        cartContainer.innerHTML = '';

        cart.forEach((product, index) => {
            cartContainer.innerHTML += `
                <div class="border-bottom">
                    <div class="product border-0">
                        <div class="product-details">
                            <h4 class="product-title">
                                <a href="#">${product.title}</a>
                            </h4>
                            <span class="cart-product-info">
                                <span class="cart-product-qty">${product.quantity}</span> × ${product.price}
                            </span>
                        </div>
                        <figure class="product-image-container">
                            <a href="#" class="product-image">
                                <img src="${admin + product.image}" alt="${product.name}" width="80" height="80">
                            </a>
                            <a href="#" class="btn-remove" title="Remove Product" onclick="removeCartItem(${index})"><span>×</span></a>
                        </figure>
                    </div>
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <h6 class="text-dark">Product Total</h6>
                        <h6 class="text-dark">${product.quantity * product.price}</h6>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        });

        // Update subtotal
        const subtotal = cart.reduce((acc, product) => acc + (product.price * product.quantity), 0);
        document.querySelector('.cart-total-price').textContent = `PKR ${subtotal.toFixed(2)}`;
    }

     window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
       
        window.addEventListener('wishlist-updated', function (event) {
            const wishlist = event.detail;
            $(".wishlist-counter").html(wishlist.length);
        });
        
        const wishlist = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('wishlist'))|| [];
        $(".wishlist-counter").html(wishlist.length);
    });
</script>
